text:
Thanks to Reto Burkhalter (reto.burkhalter AT basis06 DOT com)
Here is a patch which has been tested successfully into production
environment.

So please apply this patch and not the first one to test obgpd4.2/fbsd.

Reports are welcome

Port maintainer (farrokhi@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

--
